name: Green Mango Atjar (Green Mangoes Preserved in Spiced Oil)
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons finely chopped hot chile pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the mangoes and remove the flesh from the seeds. Cut the fruit into 1-inch cubes.
2. Combine the salt and water in a deep bowl and stir until the salt dissolves. Place the mangoes into the brine, cover tightly, and set aside at room temperature for up to one day. Drain well and pack them into a 1-quart jar or crock.
3. In a small saucepan, heat 1/4 cup of oil over low heat. Add the curry powder and turmeric and sauté for one minute. Add the chile peppers, garlic, and fenugreek. Stirring constantly, pour in the remaining 1-1/4 cups of oil. Simmer for a few minutes, then pour hot oil over the mangoes.
4. Cool to room temperature, then refrigerate for 3 days before serving.
